evals.prompt: Localize the LoginForm.tsx file - extract all the hardcoded strings and make it i18n ready
evals.expected_output: LoginForm.tsx should use useTranslation hook, all user-facing strings replaced with t() calls, and a locales/en.json catalog created with hierarchical keys

evals.prompt: Make this Flask dashboard view translation-ready. I want all the user-facing strings extracted to a JSON catalog.
evals.expected_output: dashboard.py should use a translation function for all user-facing strings, string interpolation should be handled correctly, and a JSON catalog should be created

evals.prompt: I need to internationalize this SwiftUI view. Please extract all the hardcoded strings.
evals.expected_output: ProfileView.swift should use String(localized:) or NSLocalizedString for all user-facing strings, including section headers, button labels, toggle labels, alert text, and a JSON catalog created
